category_sources: source_facts.description says cpmtools provides tools to access CP/M file systems.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cpmtools; official homepage title uses Cpmtools.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page and best available documentation/distribution surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage provides project information and release archives but no official source-control repository was identified from official sources.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable names such as cpmcp, cpmls, mkfs.cpm, and fsck.cpm indicate CP/M filesystem and disk-image tooling.
